title: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Are Helping to Block an Assisted Dying Bill
summary_full: A small group in the House of Lords has proposed hundreds of amendments that are helping stymie a bill that was meant to legalize medically assisted death for the terminally ill.
summary_public: A small group in the House of Lords has proposed hundreds of amendments that are helping stymie a bill that was meant to legalize medically assisted death for the terminally ill.

GB.label: negative
